title: Dogtrot Cabin
description: Dogtrot Cabin redefines hilltop luxury with its blend of traditional German fachwerk and contemporary design. Perched atop a scenic vantage point, this retreat offers 360-degree views, inviting nature's grandeur into every room. The layout is a modern interpretation of classic architecture, featuring two wings connected by a versatile breezeway that can be fully opened or closed for comfort.

title: Agua Vista Ranch
description: Agua Vista Ranch stands as a beacon of luxury amidst the rolling hills and spring-fed waters of Texas Hill Country. This waterfront estate seamlessly blends Californian modernity with Texan elegance, offering panoramic views that celebrate the natural beauty of its over one-hundred-acre surroundings. With its expansive windows and open design, the home captures the essence of indoor-outdoor living.

title: The Outpost
description: Discover the Outpost, a unique architectural masterpiece, seamlessly integrating modern living with the tranquility of nature. This serene compound, nestled within a live oak grove in Comfort, Texas, features a trio of buildings dedicated to living, cooking and dining, restful sleep, and practical luxury. An AIA award finalist.

title: H2 Lodge
description: This exquisite ranch in Pipe Creek, Texas, blends state-of-the-art building science with authentic materials reminiscent of a historic Western hotel and saloon. Combining modern amenities with rustic charm, the design features elements like intentionally squeaky floorboards that evoke the nostalgia of a bygone era. Every detail reflects Koviak Built's dedication to creating bespoke legacies.

title: Alta Luz
description: Nestled atop a serene wooded hill, Alta Luz stands as a modern marvel, seamlessly integrating into the natural landscape. This exquisite guest house is a testament to innovative architectural design, where the unique geometric exterior not only captivates but also cleverly conceals the entrance, creating an intriguing interplay of form and function.
